predicates.name: incorporated_as_legal_person
predicates.description: The company is incorporated as a legal person.

predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The employee criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The turnover criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The balance sheet criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_small_company_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: More than one small-company criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year.

predicates.name: not_more_than_one_small_company_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: Not more than one small-company criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year.

predicates.name: is_last_closed_financial_year
predicates.description: The first financial year is the last closed financial year on the balance sheet date of the second financial year.

predicates.name: qualifies_as_small_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a small company in the financial year.

predicates.name: consecutive_financial_year_following
predicates.description: The first financial year (Y2) is the consecutive financial year immediately following the second financial year (Y1).

predicates.name: consecutive_pair_exceeded
predicates.description: Y1 and Y2 form a consecutive pair where more than one small-company criterion is exceeded for the company in both years.

predicates.name: consecutive_pair_no_longer_exceeded
predicates.description: Y1 and Y2 form a consecutive pair where not more than one small-company criterion is exceeded for the company in both years.

predicates.name: threshold_crossing_event
predicates.description: A threshold-crossing event occurs for the company at the given financial year (Y2), meaning more than one criterion was exceeded in both Y1 and Y2.

predicates.name: no_longer_exceeded_event
predicates.description: A no-longer-exceeded event occurs for the company at the given financial year (Y2), meaning not more than one criterion was exceeded in both Y1 and Y2.

predicates.name: effect_financial_year_after_threshold_crossing
predicates.description: Y3 is the effect financial year for the company following a threshold-crossing event at Y2.

predicates.name: effect_financial_year_after_no_longer_exceeded
predicates.description: Y3 is the effect financial year for the company following a no-longer-exceeded event at Y2.

predicates.name: loses_small_company_status_from
predicates.description: The company loses small-company status from the given effect financial year.

predicates.name: gains_small_company_status_from
predicates.description: The company gains small-company status from the given effect financial year.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover
functions.description: The annual net turnover of the company in the financial year, exclusive of value added tax.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year.
